department: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office

external_services.service_name: Request for Assistance in Seeking Dismissal of the Anti-Littering Case
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Assistance in Seeking Dismissal of the Anti-Littering Case
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office
external_services.who_may_avail: Any individual/ business establishment or enterprise with anti-littering case

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Official receipt of payment (1 original and 1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Present the Criminal Case Number and subpoena
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Record client info; prepare Sworn Statement and Motion to Revive and Withdraw information

steps.client_step: 2. Receive the Sworn Statement and Motion to Withdraw
steps.agency_action: 2. Sign and release document
steps.person_responsible: Metro Aide II (duly recognized by the court)

external_services.service_name: Attending to Complaints on the Violation of Environmental Laws
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Attending to Complaints on the Violation of Environmental Laws
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of complaint with complete details of complainant (1 original, 1 photocopy) or 888 Report (2 original copies)

steps.client_step: 1. Provide information about the concern/ complaint (letter, phone, e-mail, or personal)
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.5: Receive complaint, instruct investigation, conduct on-site inspection, draft report, and sign Notice of Violation
steps.person_responsible: City ENRO, Public Services Officer IV/III/II, Administrative Aide IV

steps.client_step: 2. Receive update/ copy of report
steps.agency_action: 2. Release documents to the complainant

external_services.service_name: Evaluation of Application and Assessment of Environmental Protection and Environmental Management Fee (EMF)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Evaluation of Application and Assessment of Environmental Protection and Environmental Management Fee (EMF)
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office

checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Environmental Compliance Certificate (ECC) or Certificate of Non-Coverage (CNC)
Wastewater Discharge Permit, Permit to Operate (GenSet), Picture for Biogas (if applicable)

steps.client_step: 1. Present complete requirements to the Business One Stop Shop (BOSS)
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive/record applicant details and evaluate submitted documents

steps.client_step: 2. Receive assessment form
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Sign the business permit application form

external_services.service_name: Request for a Lecture or Orientation on Ecological Solid Waste Management
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for a Lecture or Orientation on Ecological Solid Waste Management
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of request (1 original, 1 photocopy) or Invitation (1 original)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of request or invitation
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive and endorse the letter to the City ENRO

steps.client_step: 2. Attend on the scheduled date of lecture or orientation
steps.agency_action: 2. Arrange and deliver the lecture
steps.person_responsible: City ENRO, Assistant City ENRO, Public Service Officer IV

external_services.service_name: Request for Assistance in the Conduct of Tree Planting Activity
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Assistance in the Conduct of Tree Planting Activity
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B- Government to Businesses, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All interested individuals, companies, public and private agencies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter request
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive and endorse request for proper coordination

steps.client_step: 2. Be present during inspection and other activities
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.3: Conduct site assessment, prepare site, and facilitate tree planting activity
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Environmental Management Specialist, Planning Officer I, Metro Aide II

external_services.service_name: Request for Certificate of No Objection for Cutting of Trees
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Certificate of No Objection for Cutting of Trees
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Businesses, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Business firms, government agencies, individuals and entities who wish to cut down trees

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of intent (name/quantity of trees and reason)
Barangay Clearance or Certificate of No Objection
Valid CR of power saw and photo of power saw

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of intent and complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Receive/evaluate documents, conduct ocular inspection, and prepare/sign inspection report
steps.person_responsible: City ENR Officer, Supervising EMS, Planning Officer I

steps.client_step: 2. Claim certificate and endorsement letter
steps.agency_action: 2. Issue Certificate of No Objection and endorsement letter to DENR-CENRO

external_services.service_name: Request for Certification of Clearance on Violation of Ordinance No.1 series of 2007
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Certification of Clearance on Violation of Ordinance No.1 series of 2007
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit receipt for payment of penalty/fines
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive copy of receipt and prepare certification

steps.client_step: 2. Claim certification and forward to requesting office
steps.agency_action: 2. Sign and issue certification to client

external_services.service_name: Request for Collection of Residual Wastes from the Barangays
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Collection of Residual Wastes from the Barangays
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive letter, conduct orientation/arrange pick-up, and schedule collection
steps.processing_time: 2 hours and 12 minutes (if orientation) / 12 minutes (if office request)
steps.person_responsible: City ENRO, Assistant City ENRO, General Foreman

steps.client_step: 2. Attend barangay orientation (if applicable)
steps.agency_action: Included in Step 1 actions

steps.client_step: 3. Segregate wastes properly and bring to designated place of collection
steps.agency_action: 3. Collect segregated wastes

external_services.service_name: Request for Interview and Data for Student's Thesis Research
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Interview and Data for Student's Thesis Research
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter request
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive letter request and endorse to City ENRO for approval

steps.client_step: 2. Conduct interview
steps.agency_action: 2. Deliver interview and provide data/ information needed
steps.person_responsible: City ENRO, Assistant City ENRO, Supervising EMS, PSO IV

external_services.service_name: Request for Logistical Support to Various Offices for Transportation of Goods and Equipment
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Logistical Support to Various Offices for Transportation of Goods and Equipment
external_services.office: Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of request with approval of the City Mayor (1 original copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the letter request
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive request, endorse for approval, and assign driver/helper

steps.client_step: 2. Acknowledge service provided through text or email
steps.agency_action: 2. Provide the logistical support requested
